# Chapter 2: Bearings, lubrication, tribology  (~100 pp)
- 2.1 Friction, the engineering view (10) · 2.2 Plain and rolling bearings (15) · 2.3 Lubrication regimes: boundary, mixed, hydrodynamic, EHL (18) · 2.4 Lubricant chemistry (10) · 2.5 Wear and life calculations (15) · 2.6 Seals and gaskets (12) · 2.7 Failure section: lubrication failures, premature bearing death (20)

**Archetype**: transport (lubricant film), failure. **Project**: characterise the friction of three lubricant-surface combinations. **Exercises**: 30.
